name: pattern_motif
description: One flat solid-white four-point sparkle-star silhouette, perfectly simple and smooth, designed to repeat as a subtle background wallpaper pattern (replaces a paw-print motif).
prompt_extra: single flat shape, one solid color (white), no gradient, no outline, no shading — pure silhouette

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
